defect: The TPS62130 feedback divider is inverted vs the datasheet: R1 (100k) sits top (VOUT→FB) and R2 (560k) bottom (FB→GND). With FB=0.8V this sets VOUT ≈ 0.8 * (1 + 100k/560k) ≈ 0.94V instead of the intended rail — the resistors are swapped, producing the wrong output voltage.

mustMention.why: identifies the feedback divider as the problem area
mustMention.sample: the feedback divider ratio is wrong

mustMention.why: explains the consequence is an incorrect output voltage
mustMention.sample: resulting in the wrong output voltage (Vout)
